revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大神宮 (桜川市)]]
{{Infobox religious building| |Name= Daijingu (大神宮) |image=File:IMG 大神宮（桜川市）.jpg |Location= {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}{{ill|Sakuragawa, Ibaraki|en|Sakuragawa, Ibaraki|qid=Q990350|lt=Sakuragawa City|1=Sakuragawa, Ibaraki}}{{ill|Iwase (Sakuragawa City)|ja|岩瀬 (桜川市)|lt=Iwase|lt_ja=岩瀬|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwase (Sakuragawa City)|1=Iwase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q116950442}} Nishi Ward, 216 |latitude_degrees= |latitude_minutes= |latitude_seconds= |latitude_direction= N (North) |longitude_degrees= |longitude_minutes= |longitude_seconds= |longitude_direction= E (East) |map_country_code= JP |Deity= {{ill|Great Sun Spirit|ja|大日霊貴命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Sun Spirit|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神|1=Amaterasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q455602}} |Shrine Status= {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} |Founded= {{ill|Muromachi period|en|Muromachi period|qid=Q334845|lt=Muromachi Period|1=Muromachi period}} |Main Hall= |Other Names= |Festival Date= November 15 |Rituals= |prefecture={{ill|Sakuragawa|qid=Q990350|1=Sakuragawa, Ibaraki}} }} '''Daijingu''' (大神宮) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Nishi Ward of {{ill|Iwase (Sakuragawa City)|ja|岩瀬 (桜川市)|lt=Iwase|lt_ja=岩瀬|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwase (Sakuragawa City)|1=Iwase|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q116950442}} in {{ill|Sakuragawa, Ibaraki|en|Sakuragawa, Ibaraki|qid=Q990350|lt=Sakuragawa City|1=Sakuragawa, Ibaraki}} of {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}. == Overview == [[File:IMG 八坂神社（桜川市）.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Yasaka Shrine|en|Yasaka Shrine|qid=Q692714|lt=Yasaka Shrine|1=Yasaka Shrine}}]] This Daijingu is a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} of {{ill|Nishishinden Village|ja|西新田村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishishinden Village|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and as a {{ill|Sub-shrine|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sub-shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}}, {{ill|Yasaka Shrine|en|Yasaka Shrine|qid=Q692714|lt=Yasaka Shrine|1=Yasaka Shrine}} is enshrined. [[File:IMG 桜川市西区公民館.jpg|thumb|Community Center]] The Nishi Ward Community Center is adjacent. === Related Articles === * {{ill|Sannō Shrine (Sakuragawa City)|ja|山王神社 (桜川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannō Shrine (Sakuragawa City)|1=Sannō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q119929523}} == Access == * A 10-minute walk from {{ill|Iwase Station|en|Iwase Station|qid=Q6100731|lt=Iwase Station|1=Iwase Station}}. == References == {{Reflist|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://www.ibarakiken-jinjacho.or.jp/ibaraki/kensei/sakuragawa.html Daijingu - Ibaraki Prefecture Shrine Agency] {{shinto-stub|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|大神宮 (桜川市)|version=96627326|comment=Imported full ja history}}
